name: ENCHANTED2/MT
fullName: Intensive BP Control after Endovascular Thrombectomy
teachingPoint: Avoid intensive BP lowering after successful EVT; target 140-180 mmHg.

name: OPTIMAL-BP
fullName: Intensive vs Conventional Blood Pressure Lowering after Successful Endovascular Thrombectomy
population: n=306, ≥18, NIHSS all, After successful EVT (mTICI ≥2b)
teachingPoint: Objective: intensive SBP <140 after successful EVT reduced functional independence; reinforces ENCHANTED2/MT.
